Video.summary: A haunted doll and accusations of witchcraft have a formerly married couple standing in front of the judges.
Video.title: Smith vs. Johnston

Video.summary: Accusations of cheating mixed with short tempers is a recipe for disaster in D’Mitry and Jessica’s relationship.
Video.title: Hartfield vs. Saunders

Video.summary: Danette & Matthew sleep alone at night because they live in different states. The Cutlers help them decide where to call home.
Video.title: Mahabeer vs. Turner

Video.summary: A series of red flags and an old hometown fling have Danielle questioning her boyfriend's loyalty.
Video.title: Parker vs. Riley

Video.summary: A broken cellphone after a heated argument has a Texas couple standing in front of the judges.
Video.title: Oliver vs. Boyce

Video.summary: Sarah brings ex-boyfriend Richard to court for unpaid rent; he says she had an affair with the maintenance man.
Video.title: Frye vs. Hughes

Video.summary: A woman sues her boyfriend after he tore her dress saying it was too revealing.
Video.title: Edmonds vs. Steele

Video.summary: Past infidelity has a girlfriend and boyfriend at odds over the paternity of their child.
Video.title: Ogletree vs. Lockhart

Video.summary: A battle over co-parenting takes a twist as Rico pushes for a second chance, but Alyssa intends to stand firm.
Video.title: Lopez vs. Widmer

Video.summary: Ownership of music rights brings former business partners and lovers to court.
Video.title: Curtis vs. Garland

Video.summary: A grieving grandmother demands a paternity test to uncover the truth about her late son's mysterious child.
Video.title: Moultry vs. Portuonio

Video.summary: Alexus seeks vindication because hometown rumors have her boyfriend, Kristopher, questioning the paternity of their child.
Video.title: Davis-Jones vs. Martin

Video.summary: When addiction leads to a family tragedy, the Butlers turn to the judges to learn how to work through their marital issues.
Video.title: Butler vs Butler

Video.summary: Pye sues ex-boyfriend Santiel for the return of her safe keys, saying stole them post-breakup.
Video.title: Powell-Woods vs. Chambers

Video.summary: Sexual frustrations and a gambling addiction threaten Drew and Aubrey's 16-year relationship as they battle for reconciliation.
Video.title: York-Ketner vs. Ketner

Video.summary: Demario and Necole’s relationship is tested when he tries to impose his conservative Christian values onto her.
Video.title: Scott vs. Thomas

Video.summary: When the Cowans find they’re growing apart after 10 years of marriage, they come before the judges for help.
Video.title: Cowan vs Cowan

Video.summary: A woman says her husband is failing to go the distance in their marriage.
Video.title: Covington vs. Covington

Video.summary: Several stolen wigs and one wrecked car have a Mississippi couple standing before the judges.
Video.title: Merriweather vs. Kimmons

Video.summary: A Georgia woman suspects her longtime boyfriend of cheating because he has not yet proposed.
Video.title: Harris vs. Harris

Video.summary: Since the birth of their child, Canandas denies being the father, so Charisma demands he take a paternity test.
Video.title: Paige vs Ware

Video.summary: A man says his girlfriend's actions don't match her words, which makes him suspect that she's cheating on him.
Video.title: Jackson vs. King

Video.summary: Jail, bail, and a relationship gone stale. The Wallaces come to Cutlers Court for help.
Video.title: Wallace vs Wallace

Video.summary: A woman accuses her boyfriend of being an inconvenience and a drunk, but a shocking reveal could turn the whole case on its head.
Video.title: Braddy vs. Scott

Video.summary: The Cutlers navigate a messy situationship when Ricardo brings Errollyn to court for a paternity test.
Video.title: Clarke vs. Smith

Video.summary: The Stallworths bring their relational issues to the Cutlers in a last ditch effort to save their marriage.
Video.title: Stallworth vs Stallworth

Video.summary: Secrets, suspicions and a paternity test collide as a strained couple battle for truth and trust in court.
Video.title: Moore vs. Ariza

Video.summary: Will is bringing Jazmine to court in a last-ditch effort to save their relationship from the stresses of social media.
Video.title: Bouie vs. Jackson

Video.summary: The plaintiff sues her ex-boyfriend for money she says she spent on vacations and car repairs and accuses him of stealing from her co-workers at a company function; a woman says she moved out of an apartment because she feared for her life.
Video.title: Love, Lies and Larceny

Video.summary: Yumari defends her loyalty and the paternity of her children as Larry questions everything in a custody battle.
Video.title: Hammen vs. Hamrick

Video.summary: Trust issues and tension rise as Danielle confronts Brandon about his ex-wife and lack of motivation.
Video.title: Hatch vs. Banks

Video.summary: After four years of hookups, Deja is ready to determine her compatibility with Onika and decide if she will stay or walk away.
Video.title: Lackely vs. Rivera

Video.summary: A workplace romance takes a dramatic turn as Jarius seeks the truth about his paternity of 1-year-old Legacii.
Video.title: Childs vs. Macon

Video.summary: A surprise confession changes the course of Johnathan and McKenzie's budding relationship.
Video.title: Renneberg vs. Peterson

Video.summary: A dramatic dispute over infidelity, fatherhood and responsibility puts a fragile relationship to the ultimate test.
Video.title: Cobb vs. Harper

Video.summary: Accusations of betrayal threaten their future as Christopher and Michelle seek to determine the fate of their family and home.
Video.title: Gore vs. Sherman

Video.summary: Exes duke it out in court over the paternity of a child.
Video.title: Cornell vs. Pruitt

Video.summary: An Arkansas woman accuses her husband of being addicted to pornography.
Video.title: Holmes vs. Holmes

Video.summary: A New Jersey woman sues her ex-boyfriend for property exchange of her beloved cat.
Video.title: Monsanto vs. Eskander

Video.summary: Clashing personalities have an entrepreneurial couple butting heads in their business ventures.
Video.title: Tunstall vs. Moody

Video.summary: Dawn confronts her boyfriend, Josh, about ongoing entanglements with his ex and various other women.
Video.title: Jones vs. Shaffer

Video.summary: High school sweethearts Darionna and Elijah seek help from the judges after getting a bitter taste of the struggles in marriage.
Video.title: Truell vs. Truell

Video.summary: Sarah Oliver ("Bad Girls Club") weighs in on balancing work and love in Will and Jaheim's dramatic relationship.
Video.title: Thomas vs. Duval

Video.summary: Eric is ready to marry Mazii, but she doesn't trust him; the Cutlers help them through their trust and communication issues.
Video.title: Monét vs. Martin

Video.summary: A sperm donor, suspicions of infidelity, and broken trust bring Shannon and Jasmine's rocky five-year romance to the courtroom.
Video.title: Bowman vs. Bennett

Video.summary: A young couple battle over responsibility and paternity, with shocking truths waiting to be revealed in court.
Video.title: Caldwell-Roach vs. Roach

Video.summary: Exes squabble in court over who’s to blame for their failed relationship.
Video.title: Johnson vs. Fletcher

Video.summary: A Texas man suspects his girlfriend of cheating with the father of her children.
Video.title: Hicks vs. Rodriguez

Video.summary: A boyfriend and girlfriend go head-to-head in court over a discarded promise ring and a broken camera.
Video.title: White vs. Mitchell

Video.summary: In an emotional case, Fi and Kee seek to answer questions surrounding sexuality and loyalty with a polygraph test.
Video.title: Johnson vs. Walls

Video.summary: Jacoby isn’t so happy about Amber’s business success and called off the wedding. A compatibility test decides their future.
Video.title: Rouzan vs Lunkins

Video.summary: A Georgia couple clashes in court over an ultimatum to marry or move on.
Video.title: Billingsley vs. Perrilloux

Video.summary: Angela is prepared to call off her wedding if her fiancée, Juan, proves to have been unfaithful.
Video.title: Martinez vs. Rodriguez

Video.summary: Erica is bringing Isaiah to court under allegations of stealing money intended for medical purposes to rent a party bus.
Video.title: Hendrickson vs. Bennett

Video.summary: When Queen and Demo are unable to work out their pet issues, the Cutlers help determine how these birds of a feather can stick together.
Video.title: Garrett vs. Williams

Video.summary: With help from a compatibility expert, the judges get to the bottom of Chino and Alyssa's relationship issues.
Video.title: Johnson-Smith vs. Johnson

Video.summary: With the help of an expert witness, the judges address the extravagant spending habits in Ayahna and Clarence's marriage.
Video.title: James vs. James

Video.summary: Ebony challenges Malik's loyalty with a lie detector, testing both his promise and their future in this high-stakes case.
Video.title: Peek vs. Sharpe

Video.summary: Friends-turned-lovers Kemuel and Bridget struggle to take their relationship to the next level due to a lack of trust.
Video.title: Crossty vs. Lovelace

Video.summary: Kenneth sues his wife, Monika, for $1,000 in property damage because she burned his clothes after he refused to clean up after himself.
Video.title: Burke vs. Burke

Video.summary: Suspicions of cheating and a claim for $695 have Jasmine and Gerrel seeking relationship advice.
Video.title: Doggett vs. Townsend

Video.summary: Teresa issues ex-boyfriend Keita an ultimatum: agree to consistent co-parenting or start paying child support.
Video.title: Jefferson vs. Singleton

Video.summary: A woman confronts her long-lost father to uncover the truth about her paternity and reclaim her identity.
Video.title: Brown vs. Smith

Video.summary: Imani fights for proof of paternity when Dontel refuses responsibility, demanding DNA before committing to their 1-year-old son.
Video.title: Fann vs. Coleman

Video.summary: A Miami couple's future is at stake as differing dreams and financial conflicts test their six-year relationship.
Video.title: Benatar vs. Porciello

Video.summary: Jessica demands accountability and honesty from Brandon to rebuild trust and secure their family's future amid unresolved conflicts.
Video.title: Williams vs. Williams

Video.summary: Imani and LaBron face a high-stakes compatibility test to determine if their love and family can survive.
Video.title: Gordon vs. Watson
